rules.reason: Workspace facade and manifest changes must prove typed tool input contracts.
Review, verify, and task push changes must prove publish-gate behavior.
Task routing and metadata changes must prove task-session behavior.
Test-selection logic must prove discovery, mapping, and zero-suite policy.
Workspace script/docs changes should keep audit behavior covered.
Dialer changes are call-path critical and must run package specs.
API changes must run API route and service specs.
Server changes have the broadest backend impact and should run the project test target.
Frontend package changes should run the project test target.

scripts.test:ui: corepack pnpm run test:ui:clean && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:ui:headed: corepack pnpm run test:ui:clean && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --headed
